23016.name: Escape Tunnel
23016.description: It doesn't appear too safe, either; it looks to have been the product of a pretty amateur engineer.

23017.name: Escape Tunnel
23017.description: The tunnel narrows and dips down, here. Exits lead north and south.

23018.name: Snake Pit
23018.description: This is sort of a lounge for legless lizards.

23019.name: Sewage Viaduct
23019.description: This chamber is lined with stained brick. To the north the current becomes stronger, to the south there is a hole broken through the bricks, and in the upward direction there are short chimneys where individuals may make their own contribution to the place.

n.to_room_name: Smothered by the Ooze of the Brown River

23020.name: Smothered by the Ooze of the Brown River
23020.description: Well, you should have paid more attention. If you had looked north, you would have seen that the current was getting entirely too fast for you. All of your hard-won equipment is going to settle to the bottom of the Brown River where it will one day be discovered by an obscure archaeologist. OUCH!! That hurt! You have DIED! Tough break... Shuffled off the Mortal Coil You are dead. Far beneath you, you perceive the great body of Ishar and the powerful sun, Rymaras, slowly circling it. Ishar's tiny moons dance lightly around awaiting their next brief encounter with Saorin. You reflect on your affair with life and vow to pay more attention to your fragile existence. Wishing to return, you reach a hand out to enter Ishar.

23009.name: Dungeon Catacombs
23009.description: The hallway ends in a blank wall to the north. There is a heavy door to the east and the passage recedes into the dimness to the south.

23010.name: Dungeon Catacombs
23010.description: The hallway recedes into the dimness of the north and south. There is a heavy door to the east.

23011.name: Dungeon Catacombs
23011.description: The hallway recedes into the dimness of the north. There is a heavy door to east, and a narrow doorway to the south.

23012.name: Inquisitorium
23012.description: Equipped with the latest in information-gathering equipment, this modern facility provides the evidence that is vital to the safety and well-being of Poortown. After all, the true power of any state is derived from its ability to do violence.

23013.name: Hopeless Cell
23013.description: You imagine people who get deposited here would have a lot of time on their hands. There is a mound of straw in the east corner.

23014.name: Hopeless Cell
23014.description: It seems like people who get deposited here would have a lot of time on their hands to dig around. There is a mound of straw in the east corner.

23015.name: Hopeless Cell
23015.description: It seems like people who get deposited here would have a lot of time on their hands to dig around. There is a mound of straw in the east corner.

23040.name: On the Drainpipe
23040.description: You have a close-up view of a cast iron pipe.

23041.name: The Edge of the Rooftop
23041.description: Lots of pipeweed ashes litter the rooftop around here.

23042.name: The Littered Rooftops
23042.description: This landscape is composed of rooftops jutting and careening at all sorts of odd angles. Your only paths are to the south, east, and west.

23043.name: On the Drainpipe
23043.description: Your clothes are just going to get COVERED in rust stains.

23044.name: The Edge of the Rooftop
23044.description: A low stone wall runs along the west side of the roof. It is composed of crumbling bricks held together by vestiges of mortar.

23045.name: On the Drainpipe
23045.description: The handholds make traversing this section of pipe fairly easy.

23046.name: The Edge of the Rooftop
23046.description: A low stone wall runs along the west side of the roof. It is composed of crumbling bricks held together by vestiges of mortar.

23048.name: The Edge of the Rooftop
23048.description: A low stone wall runs along the west side of the roof. It is composed of crumbling bricks held together by vestiges of mortar. The south edge is garnished by a low wrought-iron fence.

23049.name: The Littered Rooftops
23049.description: The way to the south is blocked by a leaning pigeon-coop. You can go east or west.

23050.name: Pigeon Coop
23050.description: This small lean-to is roofed with old planks. Two of its sides are also made of planks, while the other two are open frameworks covered in nets made of woven wire. One of the planked walls is common to a shack to the east, but there is no way inside from here.

23051.name: The Rooftop Shack
23051.description: Even on the brightest of days this shack is dim. It is furnished with a cot made of planks, a couple of seats nailed into the wall, and a small table.

23052.name: The Broken Rooftops
23052.description: You find yourself on a relatively flat section of the roofs between a shack to the north and the building's edge to the south.

23054.name: The Rooftops
23054.description: Your way is limited to travel to the west and south.

23055.name: The Path on the Roofs
23055.description: You are on a path through mounds of junk. The west is bordered by a shack, but you can travel north, south, or east.

23056.name: A Path on the Roof
23056.description: A path leads north from here, or you can skirt the edge of a shack by heading west.

23057.name: Clutching the Overhang
23057.description: You hang by your fingertips as you try to work your way around a projecting cornice.

23058.name: Walking a Thin Plank
23058.description: One misstep and you will go plummeting to the alley below.

23059.name: Rooftop Shack
23059.description: The insides of this shack are covered with graffiti. Even the rafters of the roof.

23060.name: The Gang Hideout
23060.description: You are in the bottom of a large wooden tower that once held rainwater. It now contains cushions and a low table, and the air is heavy with the grey- white swirling of pipeweed smoke. A ladder leads upward.

23061.name: The Crib
23061.description: This room holds several mats. It smells of sweat and bile, alcohol and candle wax. Huge dust-balls, half-made of shed human hair, lurk in the corners.

npcs.name: Babyface Jimmy
npcs.description: His smooth, round face earned him his nickname, but his ruthlessness earned him his position as the Captain of the Giants.

23062.name: The Green Hotel
23062.description: This dive gives you more for your money. Fleas. There is a small sign posted on the front counter.

23066.name: Low Tunnel
23066.description: This tunnel bends from west to south. There is a narrow wooden door to the east. The tunnel is very humid, and the thick supporting beams are covered in a thin mildew.

23067.name: The Cleared Alcove
23067.description: This space is cleared away, unlike the rest of the cellar. The walls are paneled to keep out the dirt.

23068.name: The Fruit Cellar
23068.description: This place is stuffed with crates of fruits and vegetables. A low alcove is relatively clear of space to the west.

23069.name: Narrow Tunnel
23069.description: This tunnel narrows sharply and a wooden stair leads up to the south.

23070.name: A Wooden Stair
23070.description: The stair groans under your feet. It's old rotting planks have been replaced here and there.

23071.name: The Warehouse
23071.description: This is a huge, dimly lit room. It is packed with crates, barrels, and boxes. Light filters in through dancing dust, and you get the feeling that there is always some sort of unsavory activity taking place here. You can see windows looking out into the street.

23072.name: The Office
23072.description: This dingy room serves as an office for an import-export company. A door leads west, and a tattered curtain covers a doorway to the north.

23074.name: Oldgate Exchequer
23074.description: The smell of coins washes over you as you step off of Temple Street into this unpretentious brick building. The room is rather small and uncluttered; the only noteworthy feature is a wooden desk in the middle of the room, scattered with obsidian coins.

23075.name: Dump of Oldgate
23075.description: Piles upon piles of unidentifiable junk cover the entire the surface of this room. Everywhere you attempt to step, you are face to face with what seems a mountain of burnt garbage. The only direction you can move in this place appears to be to the east.

23076.name: The Nook
23076.description: This small hovel barely provides enough room to move about. A smattering of old texts lies strewn about the floor, most of them bound in the darkest of ancient leathers. If you tried hard enough, you could find just enough room to sit and study some new incantation.

322.name: On the Ledge
322.description: You find yourself on a narrow ledge. To go up you must climb around an overhang and swing yourself up to the roof above. It doesn't look easy.

23000.name: Entrance Room
23000.description: This dingy little room has exits to the north, south, east, and west. It seems to serve mainly as a repository for filth.

23001.name: Kennels
23001.description: This room is well-maintained. It has lots of rushes cast about on the floor, and there are clear bowls of water lying about for the dogs to drink from.

23002.name: Cafeteria
23002.description: Okay, so they serve doughnuts. Don't make a big deal about it. They have lots of other stuff, too. Like coffee. Just shut up and order something, or get out.

23003.name: Booking Room
23003.description: This is where the mage identifies you for trial, and they take all of your stuff and pretend like they are going to give it back to you.

23004.name: Drunk Tank
23004.description: Such a SMELL! Oy vay! This place reeks of every bodily excretion that your mind can conceive. This looks like a regular stopping place for every drunk, two-bit thief, and prostitute in the entire city. Actually, it reminds you a lot of your last New Year's Eve party.

23021.name: The Brown River
23021.description: Watersnakes slither past as you travel down a polluted section of the river. Casting a glance southward the source of the contamination becomes clear; several sewage ditches from the city of Oldgate empty out into this river.

23022.name: The Brown River
23022.description: The river current flows slowly westward near the city of Oldgate. Ahead the auldbridge crosses the river and allows passage into the city. Further east the river rises slightly at the edge of a dark forest.

23023.name: Beneath Auldbridge
23023.description: You pass under a low bridge at the entrance of Oldgate. A plethora of disgusting little creatures have determined this as their place of permanent residence, and scowl at your intrusion. The river travels west and east.

23024.name: The Brown River
23024.description: Bits of sewage and ... what may or may not be pieces of bodies, float by at this narrow passage along the brown river. Westward a small quay can be seen, and to the east rises Auldbridge.

23025.name: The Brown River
23025.description: To the south you see a quay made of granite. It rises to meet the busy streets of Poortown. The heavily polluted waterway crawls westward. To the east it passes under a wide bridge.

23026.name: The Brown River
23026.description: The river slowly flows away from the town of Oldgate. As it distances itself, the water begins to clear a bit, yet remains quite murky.

23037.name: Gym Entrance
23037.description: Are all gyms painted in this sickly, pale green color? The weight room is due east.

23038.name: The Weight Room
23038.description: This room is well-stocked with weights, benches, racks and mirrors. Exits lead to the west and to the south.

23039.name: Training Room
23039.description: This room is filled by two rings. One is a boxing ring, while the other has low wooden walls, and is used for weapons practice. You see an exit to the north.

23005.name: Closet
23005.description: You struggle with your self-esteem as you realize that you are in the closet. Do you want to come out?

23006.name: Upstairs Hallway
23006.description: This short, narrow hallway has a small door to the west, a large door to the north, and a passage to the east.

23007.name: Guards Lounge
23007.description: This small room allows prison guards a little respite from their daily chores. Drawings of voluptuous women are pinned on all the walls.

23008.name: Warden's Office
23008.description: The dark paneling and high-backed leather chair make this room a somber and forbidding place.
